dashboard.name: Build an operations error analysis dashboard focused on erro [MCP Custom]

variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == "Telecommunications" | fields json.companyName | dedup json.companyName

fetch bizevents 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName
| fields json.journeyType | dedup json.journeyType
fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter json.companyName == "Telecommunications" | fields json.stepName | dedup json.stepName

fetch bizevents
| fields json.serviceName, json.companyName, json.journeyType
| summarize count(),by:{json.companyName, json.journeyType, json.serviceName}
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType)
| dedup json.serviceName
| fields json.serviceName = lower(json.serviceName)
| filter isNotNull(json.serviceName)

smartscapeNodes PROCESS
| lookup [smartscapeNodes SERVICE | fields id, name], sourceField:name, lookupField:name, prefix:"svc."
| lookup [timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage), by:{dt.smartscape.process}], sourceField:id, lookupField:dt.smartscape.process, fields:{cpu}
| filter isNotNull(cpu)
| fieldsAdd LowerService = lower(name)
| filter in(LowerService, $Service)
| fields id
| dedup id

0.content:
# Build an operations error analysis dashboard focused on erro
## Telecommunications | Purchase Journey Journey | Business Observability
**Data Signals:** 🔧 Services
---

3.title: 📈 Total Journey Volume
3.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize TotalEvents = count()

4.title: ✅ Journey Success Rate
4.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) 
| fieldsAdd success_rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:2)

5.title: 💰 Total Revenue
5.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize revenue = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal)

6.title: ❌ Total Errors
6.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)

8.title: 📊 Journey Step Metrics
8.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize 
    OrdersInStep = count(), 
    SuccessRate = round((toDouble(countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2),
    AvgTimeInStep = avg(additionalfields.processingTime),
    ErrorsInStep = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true),
    ErrorRate = round((toDouble(countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2), 
    by: {json.stepName} 
| sort OrdersInStep desc

9.title: 📈 Volume Over Time
9.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false), failed = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), bins:30

10.title: 📊 Events by Step
10.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc | limit 10

12.content: *No additional business metrics found in the bizevent data for this journey. Run a journey simulation to populate business metrics.*

14.title: ⚡ Step Performance
14.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize Events = count(), AvgTime = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), ErrorRate = round((toDouble(countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2), by: {json.stepName} 
| sort Events desc

15.title: 📋 SLA Compliance (< 5s)
15.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize TotalEvents = count(), WithinSLA = countIf(additionalfields.processingTime < 5000), by: {json.stepName} | fieldsAdd ComplianceRate = (WithinSLA / TotalEvents) * 100

16.title: 🕐 Hourly Activity Pattern
16.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | fieldsAdd hour = toString(getHour(timestamp)) | summarize Events = count(), by: {hour} | sort hour asc

18.title: 📉 Error Rate Trend
18.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries {errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), total = count()}, bins:30 | fieldsAdd ErrorRate = (errors[] / total[]) * 100

19.title: ❌ Errors by Step
19.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter additionalfields.hasError == true | summarize ErrorCount = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort ErrorCount desc

20.title: 🐛 Error Details
20.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter additionalfields.hasError == true | summarize Occurrences = count(), by: {json.stepName, additionalfields.errorMessage} | sort Occurrences desc | limit 20

22.title: Requests
22.query:
timeseries requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
           by:{dt.entity.service}
           | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

23.title: Requests - Success vs Failed
23.query:
timeseries total = sum(dt.service.request.count, default:0),
           failed = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count,default:0),
           nonempty: true, 
           filter: in(dt.smartscape.service, array($Service)) 
| fieldsAdd success = total[] -failed[]
| fields timeframe,
         interval,
         success,
         failed

24.title: Requests - Key Requests
24.query:
timeseries requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
           by:{endpoint.name},
           filter: endpoint.name != "NON_KEY_REQUESTS" and
           in(dt.entity.service, array($Service))
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          endpoint.name,
          requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc         
| limit 100

26.title: Failed Requests
26.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service}
           | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

27.title: 5xx Errors
27.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter:
           http.response.status_code >= 500 and http.response.status_code <= 599 
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| limit 100

28.title: 4xx Errors
28.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter:
           http.response.status_code >= 400 and http.response.status_code <= 499
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          errors
|filter in(service, array($Service))
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100

30.title: 💥 TRACES WITH EXCEPTIONS: Click on Endpoint to open Trace. Or use Open-With Dynatrace Intelligence CoPilot to explain Exception
30.query:
fetch spans
| fieldsAdd serviceName = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| filter in(serviceName, array($Service))

| fieldsAdd exception.stacktrace = span.events[][exception.stack_trace]
| fieldsAdd exception.class = span.events[1][exception.type]
| fieldsAdd eventname = span.events[1][span_event.name]
| fieldsAdd exception.message = toString(span.events[1][exception.message])
| fieldsAdd trace_id = toString(trace.id), span_id = toString(span.id)

| filter eventname == "exception"
| filter isNotNull(span.exit_by_exception_id)

| lookup [fetch dt.entity.service | fields id, entity.name], sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:id, prefix:"svc."
| fieldsAdd Service = svc.entity.name

| fields Time = start_time,
         start_time,
         end_time,
         Service,
         Endpoint = concat("[", if(isnull(endpoint.name), span.name, else: endpoint.name), "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?cv=a%2Cfalse\u0026sidebar=a%2Cfalse\u0026filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+AND+endpoint.name+%3D+",endpoint.name,"+AND+trace.id+%3D+",
                         trace_id,"\u0026traceId=",trace_id,"\u0026spanId=",span_id,"\u0026tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,"\u0026pb=true","\u0026tt=",encodeUrl(toString(start_time)),")"),
         ExceptionClass = if(isNotNull(exception.class),exception.class, else:"N/A"),
         ExceptionMesssage = concat("🤖 ", if(isNotNull(exception.message),exception.message, else:"N/A")),
         Exception = if(isNotNull(exception.stacktrace),exception.stacktrace, else:"N/A"),
         Duration = duration,
         dt.entity.service, 
         trace.id,
         span.id     
| sort start_time desc
| limit 200
| fieldsAdd prompt=concat("Analyze the Exception, Service and Endpoint and tell me how to fix the exception ", `ExceptionClass`, ":", ExceptionMesssage), execute=true, contexts=array(record(type="supplementary", value=substring(concat(`Exception`, " Service", `Endpoint`), to:20000)))

31.title: 💥 Top Exceptions
31.query:
fetch dt.davis.events, from:now()-24h
| filter event.kind == "ERROR_EVENT"
| summarize occurrences = count(), lastSeen = takeLast(timestamp), by: {event.name, dt.entity.service}
| fieldsAdd serviceName = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort occurrences desc
| limit 15

32.title: 🚨 Active Dynatrace Intelligence Problems
32.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE"
| fields display_id, title, affected_entity_ids, event.start, event.status, management_zone
| sort event.start desc
| limit 10

33.title: 📋 Recent Log Errors
33.query:
fetch logs, from:now()-1h
| filter loglevel == "ERROR" or loglevel == "WARN"
| fields timestamp, loglevel, content, dt.entity.service
| fieldsAdd serviceName = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 20

35.title: 🗺️ Journey Activity Heatmap (Step × Hour)
35.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | fieldsAdd hour = formatTimestamp(timestamp, format: "HH") | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName, hour} | sort hour asc

36.title: 🌍 Event Distribution by Region
36.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.region) | summarize Events = count(), Revenue = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal), by: {additionalfields.region} | sort Events desc

38.title: 🕐 Hourly Activity Pattern
38.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | fieldsAdd hour = toString(getHour(timestamp)) | summarize Events = count(), by: {hour} | sort hour asc

39.title: 📊 Event Volume Distribution
39.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc

40.title: ⏱️ Processing Time Trend
40.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries avg_processing = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), p90_processing = percentile(additionalfields.processingTime, 90), bins:30

41.title: 📉 Success vs Failure Trend
41.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries success = countIf(json.journeyStatus == "Success"), failed = countIf(json.journeyStatus == "Failed"), bins:30

43.content:
